zh.Free Chapel, Hastings Chapel: 美國田納西州馬歇爾海斯廷斯 查阿培爾
zh.Hinckley, Leicestershire, England: 英國萊希斯特斯爾欣克利
zh.lifeSummary: Guillaume II Comte d'Eu是Robert d'Eu Lord of Hastings Comte d'Eu的兒子，於1092年之前出生在法國。他於大約1075年與Helisende d'Avranches在法國諾門迪曼其阿福朗徹斯結婚。他去世於1096年1月2日在英國素可海斯廷斯，埋葬在美國田納西州馬歇爾海斯廷斯 查阿培爾。

zh-hans.Hinckley, Leicestershire, England: 英国萊希斯特斯爾欣克利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Guillaume II Comte d'Eu是Robert d'Eu Lord of Hastings Comte d'Eu的儿子，于1092年之前出生在法国。他于大约1075年与Helisende d'Avranches在法国諾門迪曼其阿福朗徹斯结婚。他去世于1096年1月2日在英国素可海斯廷斯，埋葬在美国田纳西州馬歇爾海斯廷斯 查阿培爾。

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: Guillaume II Comte d'Eu was born before 1092, in France as the son of Robert d'Eu Lord of Hastings Comte d'Eu. He married Helisende d'Avranches about 1075, in Avranches, Manche, Normandy, France. He died on 2 January 1096, in Hastings, Sussex, England, and was buried in Hastings Chapel, Marshall, Tennessee, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Guillaume II Comte d'Eu est né avant 1092, à France, fils de Robert d'Eu Lord of Hastings Comte d'Eu. Il a épousé Helisende d'Avranches environ 1075, à Avranches, Manche, Normandie, France. Il est décédé le 2 janvier 1096, à Hastings, Sussex, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Hastings Chapel, Marshall, Tennessee, États-Unis.

de.Free Chapel, Hastings Chapel: Hastings Chapel, Marshall, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten
de.lifeSummary: Guillaume II Comte d'Eu wurde vor 1092 in Frankreich, als Sohn von Robert d'Eu Lord of Hastings Comte d'Eu geboren. Er hat um 1075 in Avranches, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich Helisende d'Avranches geheiratet. Er starb am 2. Januar 1096 in Hastings, Sussex, England und wurde in Hastings Chapel, Marshall, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Guillaume II Comte d'Eu è nato il prima del 1092 nel Francia come figlio di Robert d'Eu Lord of Hastings Comte d'Eu. Lui sposato Helisende d'Avranches circa 1075, nel Avranches, Manche, Normandie, Francia. Morì il 2 gennaio 1096, nel Hastings, Sussex, England, e fu sepolto a Hastings Chapel, Marshall, Tennessee, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.Free Chapel, Hastings Chapel: アメリカ合衆国テネシー州マーシャルハスティングズ チャペル
ja.Hastings, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスハスティングズ
ja.Hinckley, Leicestershire, England: イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアヒンックリー
ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume II Comte d'Euは1092年以前にフランスでRobert d'Eu Lord of Hastings Comte d'Euの息子として生まれた。約1075年にフランスノーマンディマンチェアvランチェスでHelisende d'Avranchesと結婚した。彼は1096年1月2日にイギリススセックスハスティングズで死去し，アメリカ合衆国テネシー州マーシャルハスティングズ チャペルにて埋葬された。

ko.Free Chapel, Hastings Chapel: 미국 테네시 주 마샤 하스틴그스 차플
ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume II Comte d'Eu(은)는 1092년 이전 프랑스에서 Robert d'Eu Lord of Hastings Comte d'Eu의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1075년 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 아브랭체스에서 Helisende d'Avranches(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1096년 1월 2일 영국 수세스 하스틴그스에서 사망했으며 미국 테네시 주 마샤 하스틴그스 차플에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Guillaume II Comte d'Eu nasceu antes 1092, em França filho de Robert d'Eu Lord of Hastings Comte d'Eu. Ele casou-se com Helisende d'Avranches aproximadamente 1075, em Avranches, Manche, Normandie, França. Ele faleceu em 2 de janeiro de 1096, em Hastings, Sussex, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Hastings Chapel, Marshall, Tenessi, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Free Chapel, Hastings Chapel: хастингс чапел, маршолл, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Guillaume II Comte d'Eu родился перед 1092 г. в местности Франция. Его отца звали Robert d'Eu Lord of Hastings Comte d'Eu. Он женился на женщине по имени Helisende d'Avranches около 1075 г. в местности авранчесь, манч, норманди, Франция. Он умер 2 января 1096 г. в местности хастингс, суссекс, Англия и был похоронен в местности хастингс чапел, маршолл, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты.
